inline_comments.message: Use of LATEST has been dropped as of Maven version 3.

Please be specific in the header summary - relate the summary to the code you are uploading, in other words mention specifics about the jar and java file that are being removed "Removed dgbuilder printyangtoprop binaries" - in the body of the commit message it would be helpful to explain why the change was made ( I know why, binaries are not allowed in ONAP git repos, but it's helpful to make these things explicit).
